TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: Astaghfiru-llah (x3), Allahumma Anta-s-Salam, wa minka-s-salam, tabarakta ya Dha-l-Jalali wa-l-Ikram.
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Astaghfiru-llah (x3), Allahumma Anta-s-Salam, wa minka-s-salam, tabarakta ya Dha-l-Jalali wa-l-Ikram.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: I seek the forgiveness of Allah. O Allah, You are The Flawless and The Source of Peace, and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, full of Majesty and Honour.
TEXT.REFERENCE: Thawban (raḍiy Allahu ‘anhu) reported that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ finished his prayer, he would seek forgiveness three times and say [the above]. (Muslim 591)
